title_en: Worship Law: Where Hanafi and Maliki Agree and Diverge
title_ar: فقه العبادات: أوجه الاتفاق والاختلاف بين الحنفي والمالكي
content_en:
The worship law sections of Imam Muhammad's recension provide a systematic account of where the Hanafi and Maliki positions agree and where they diverge, presented through the format of Imam Muhammad's commentary on Imam Malik's traditions. The purification sections are among the most instructive: Imam Malik's traditions on ablution and ritual cleanliness are presented and then assessed from the Hanafi perspective, with Imam Muhammad noting the points of agreement and explaining the Hanafi basis for any disagreement. These sections preserve the earliest systematic Hanafi-Maliki dialogue on ritual law.

The prayer sections of the recension address the many questions of prayer methodology on which the two schools differed, including the raising of hands at various points during prayer, the placement of hands during the standing position, and the specific wordings of recitations within the prayer. Imam Muhammad's presentations of the Maliki positions from Imam Malik's own transmission, followed by the Hanafi positions with their reasoning, create a sustained dialogue on these questions that has been studied in Hanafi educational contexts as a model of juristic engagement with a competing school.

The fasting sections present the Maliki traditions on Ramadan and voluntary fasting alongside the Hanafi assessments. The points of agreement are significant — both schools accept the same basic obligations of Ramadan fasting — while the points of disagreement tend to be in the finer details of what breaks or does not break the fast and the rulings governing expiatory acts. Imam Muhammad's careful presentation of these agreements and disagreements is a model of the comparative juristic method in its formative period.

The pilgrimage sections of the recension are particularly detailed and address the rites of hajj through both Imam Malik's traditions and the Hanafi response. The Hanafi and Maliki schools agreed on the broad outlines of pilgrimage performance while disagreeing on various details, and Imam Muhammad's recension documents this agreement and disagreement with a clarity that makes it an important primary source for the history of Islamic pilgrimage jurisprudence.
title_id: Hukum Ibadah: Titik Sepakat dan Perbedaan Hanafi-Maliki
content_id:
Bagian-bagian hukum ibadah dalam riwayat Imam Muhammad memberikan penjelasan sistematis tentang di mana posisi Hanafi dan Maliki sepakat dan di mana mereka berbeda, disajikan melalui format komentar Imam Muhammad atas riwayat-riwayat Imam Malik. Bagian-bagian thaharah adalah yang paling instruktif: riwayat-riwayat Imam Malik tentang wudhu dan kebersihan ritual disajikan kemudian dinilai dari perspektif Hanafi, dengan Imam Muhammad mencatat titik-titik persetujuan dan menjelaskan dasar Hanafi untuk setiap perbedaan. Bagian-bagian ini menyimpan dialog Hanafi-Maliki paling awal yang sistematis tentang hukum ritual.

Bagian-bagian shalat dalam riwayat ini membahas banyak pertanyaan tentang tata cara shalat di mana kedua madzhab berbeda, termasuk mengangkat tangan pada berbagai momen selama shalat, posisi tangan selama berdiri, dan bacaan-bacaan spesifik dalam shalat. Penyajian Imam Muhammad tentang posisi-posisi Maliki dari transmisi Imam Malik sendiri, diikuti posisi-posisi Hanafi beserta penalarannya, menciptakan dialog berkelanjutan tentang pertanyaan-pertanyaan ini yang telah dipelajari dalam konteks pendidikan Hanafi sebagai model keterlibatan yuridis dengan madzhab yang berbeda.

Bagian-bagian puasa menyajikan riwayat-riwayat Maliki tentang Ramadan dan puasa sunnah bersama penilaian-penilaian Hanafi. Titik-titik persetujuan cukup signifikan — kedua madzhab menerima kewajiban-kewajiban dasar puasa Ramadan yang sama — sementara titik-titik perbedaan cenderung pada hal-hal teknis: kondisi yang tepat dari puasa yang sah, cara mengganti puasa yang terlewat, dan status kafarah untuk berbagai pelanggaran. Riwayat-riwayat haji dalam riwayat Imam Muhammad disajikan bersama analisis Hanafi tentang di mana metodologi ritual kedua madzhab berbeda, memberikan gambaran komparatif awal dari cara dua tradisi memahami ritual ziarah.
